# Vaikunth Guruswamy

> AI Researcher and ML Engineer based in the UK. MSc Artificial Intelligence (Distinction, 82%)
> from the University of Edinburgh. Currently Full-Stack Software Engineer at ZOT, UK.
> Specialising in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, LLMs, and full-stack web development.

## About

Vaikunth Guruswamy is an AI-focused engineer with hands-on experience building production ML
systems, full-stack applications, and cloud infrastructure. His work spans research-grade deep
learning (Amazon collaboration on LLM memorisation) to deployed enterprise software (ERP, ATS,
and Azure cloud platforms at ZOT).

## Experience

- Full-Stack Software Engineer — ZOT, UK (Feb 2025 – Present)
  Built production Angular 19 + Python/Azure ERP with AI-native features, RBAC, and SSO.
- Industry Collaborated Dissertation — Amazon (Mar 2024 – Aug 2024)
  Reduced LLM memorisation by 17% using Few-Shot Learning and 8-bit quantisation.

## Education

- MSc Artificial Intelligence — University of Edinburgh (2023–2024), 82% Distinction
- BE Electronics and Communication — Anna University (2019–2023), CGPA 9.50/10

## Key Skills

Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Large Language Models, Transformers,
Computer Vision, Generative AI, LLMOps, Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, React, Angular, Next.js,
TypeScript, Azure, Docker, PostgreSQL.

## Projects

11 projects spanning NLP (Neural Machine Translation, RNN/GRU Language Modelling),
Computer Vision (Autonomous Vehicle, Smart Glass, Face Recognition),
and Machine Learning (Chess Engine with RL, Spotify Hit Predictor).
